_comment: User-scope MCP servers. scripts/install-mcp.sh merges each entry's `json` into the mcpServers block of ~/.claude.json (user scope, global). Direct merge — no `claude` CLI — so no token lands in argv/ps, same pattern as install.sh merging claude-settings.json. Re-runnable; existing entries are overwritten, ~/.claude.json backed up first.
_comment_secret: $ZAI_TOKEN is a PLACEHOLDER only. install-mcp.sh resolves it from the macOS Keychain (cc-zai-token) on the host, or the ZAI_TOKEN env var (providers.env, mounted by cc-launch) inside a container. Never committed. Matches repo invariant #1: tokens keychain-only — never git, image, or .zshrc.
_comment_binaries: stdio servers need their binary on PATH in BOTH host and container. headroom (pip install headroom-ai[all]) + markitdown-mcp (pip install markitdown-mcp) are baked in Dockerfile.User. npx (playwright, zai) uses the image node. On the host, install markitdown-mcp via `uv tool install markitdown-mcp` (or pip).
